recent_review_snippets: Chronic staffing turnover in operations and billing.
Leadership transition has delayed corrective action plans.

signals.label: Consecutive material weaknesses
signals.detail: Material weaknesses persisted FY2022-FY2024 in personnel cost controls.

signals.label: Questioned costs
signals.detail: FAC reported $287,000 in questioned costs.

signals.label: Burn profile pressure
signals.detail: 91% spend against 95% elapsed time suggests constrained closeout margin.

signals.label: Delinquent federal debt
signals.detail: SAM indicates $142,000 delinquent debt.

signals.label: Headcount contraction
signals.detail: Workforce declined 34% quarter-over-quarter.

signals.label: Leadership vacancy
signals.detail: Executive Director role remains vacant.

signals.label: Consecutive material weaknesses
signals.detail: Material weaknesses persisted FY2022-FY2024 in personnel cost controls.

signals.label: Questioned costs
signals.detail: FAC reported $287,000 in questioned costs.

signals.label: Burn profile pressure
signals.detail: 91% spend against 95% elapsed time suggests constrained closeout margin.

signals.label: Delinquent federal debt

timeline.description: FY2022 single audit identified material weakness in personnel cost controls.
FY2023 audit repeated personnel cost control material weakness.
USASpending refresh showed burn rate at 91% on $3.8M award.
FY2024 audit reported third consecutive material weakness and $287K questioned costs.
SAM flagged $142K delinquent federal debt on active registration.
Crustdata showed 34% headcount decline and Executive Director vacancy.
Composite risk score finalized at 9.2 (critical).
